title: Multiplayer Starterpack
description: A collection of client-side mods for quality-of-life improvements which also work in multiplayer without having to modify the server.
body:
A collection of client-side mods for quality-of-life improvements which also work in multiplayer without having to modify the server.

Please note that each mod has its own license, please consult with each mod for details.

I currently create this pack by hand inside Prism Launcher, so the source repository is  a placeholder in case I want to improve the process in the future, but you can post issues there if there are any.

I'm mostly creating this modpack for my friends and myself to get going more quickly.

Have fun playing! <3

# Modlist
- [AdvancedLootInfo](https://modrinth.com/mod/PEPVViac) by Yanny
- [Anvian's Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/PuTjrq4T) by anvian
